narrative:
Beavercreek 091 (precinct in Greene County) has 983 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
